prompt: A manufacturing plant operates 5 days a week, producing 450 units daily. Due to quality control, 10% of the produced units are found to be defective and are discarded. The remaining good units are packaged into boxes, with 25 units per box. Shipping costs are $18 per box. However, for every full set of 10 boxes shipped, a discount applies, reducing the cost for those 10 boxes to $15 each. Calculate the total shipping cost for one week's production.
